samplingFrame: Core 28-document set drawn from Abraham Lincoln's speeches, letters, and public addresses (1838-1865), fully annotated in lincoln-metaphor-analysis. PPW #195 registered 36 core documents: 28 confirmed (v3 baseline) plus 8 planned v4 additions from LMA #113; 12-document gap to 48-doc v4 target pending LMA #113 resolution. PPW #196 defined the validation-tier scope (75-100 docs total; passage-segmentation-only annotation; 9 candidate categories; additional documents pending LMA #114). PPW #197 defined the reference-tier scope (open-ended count; search-only indexing; 6 candidate categories; contemporaneous-context docs flagged for scoring exclusion; specific documents pending LMA #115).
notes: PPW #195 populated documents.json with 36 core entries (28 confirmed + 8 planned v4 additions from LMA #113). PPW #196 defined the validation-tier scope and annotation level (passage-segmentation-only) with 9 candidate categories; specific additional documents pending LMA #114 resolution. Per-corpus folder created in PPW #137. 12 more core documents needed to reach v4 target of 48 (pending LMA #113). PPW #197 defined the reference-tier scope (search-only; open-ended count; 6 candidate categories; non-Lincoln contemporaneous docs flagged for scoring exclusion; pending LMA #115). Raw text import planned for Milestone 16 (PPW #198).

samplingFrame: 41-document stratified corpus spanning American Revolution, Napoleonic, Lincoln, and Nazi-era cases under Koenigsberg's Law of Sacrifice, selected via the sacrifice-law-workbench manifest-driven pipeline. PPW #149 records proposed PPW case IDs for American Revolution and Napoleon; both still require case folders before their subsets can be imported. Corpus import into PPW is planned for Milestone 17.
notes: American Revolution and Napoleon have proposed PPW case IDs in data/corpora/sacrifice-law-comparative-41/cases.json, but the corresponding PPW case folders do not yet exist. Corpus import planned for Milestone 17. No documents imported yet as of Milestone 15; per-corpus folder created in PPW #138.
